svg.text: Unified Rewards Platform — Detailed Class Diagram (Domain Model + CQRS Application Layer)
7 modules · inheritance & composition · MediatR CQRS pipeline · EF Core 8 · integration interfaces
+ Id; + Name; + Type : BenefitType; + MonthlyCost : decimal; + CurrencyCode : string
APPLICATION LAYER — MediatR CQRS pipeline (generic; repeats for every module)
Claims & Documents example · Commands/Queries · Handlers · FluentValidation · Serilog · EF Core 8 · Integration adapters
runs validators before the handler; throws on failure
stores receipt, runs OCR, persists, publishes event
one handler class per Command / Query (all modules)
provider model — SQLite [local] / Azure SQL · Cosmos [cloud]
same DbContext · same LINQ · same migrations
state machine: DRAFT → SUBMITTED → UNDER_REVIEW → APPROVED → SETTLED
The same Command → Validator → Behaviors → Handler → EF Core / adapter structure repeats for every module (Benefits, Compensation, Payroll,
Promotions, User Management, Reporting & Audit). Domain entities are detailed in the per-module clusters above.
